name: com.clauxel.statewrightgate/statewrightgate-mcp
title: Statewright Transition Gate
description: Statewright Transition Gate is a paid hosted remote MCP for Statewright. It exposes Streamable HTTP tool calls, bearer-token access, public server-card metadata, usage logs, and receipt-oriented JSON for AI agent workflows.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token from the product website.
